watchlist.title: Inception
watchlist.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

watchlist.title: Breaking Bad
watchlist.overview: Walter White, a New Mexico chemistry teacher, is diagnosed with Stage III cancer and given a prognosis of only two years left to live. He becomes filled with a sense of fearlessness and an unrelenting desire to secure his family's financial future at any cost as he enters the dangerous world of drugs and crime.
